title: Sending mass campaigns and tracking message open rates on Monday Work
excerpt:

posts.author: Arek (Arkadiusz)
posts.cookedHtml:
A function that is only available in Monday CRM would also be useful in the Monday WORK package.

We want to send our organization’s newsletter to volunteers and workers and we want to see how many of these people read our newsletter and practical information before the event or meeting.
We want to send a new procedure and inform everyone on the volunteer list about some actions or events in the life of the organization.

Once the function is built, it only needs to be made available on Monday Work.
